title: Modular Machinery Reborn Ars Nouveau
description: Modular Machinery Reborn addon to integrate ars nouveau
body:
Thid mod requires Ars Nouveau and Modular Machinery Reborn to be installed to be operational

 

The mod includes  tiered, configurable tiers of source input/output hatches to allow for the creation of big multiblock machinery like Gregtech's Implosion Compressor, Vacuum Freezer, ... and whatever you might imagine.

 

This mod has an integration with the Modular Machinery Reborn recipe system in json and KubeJS.

 

Discord : For questions or support, join the Discord Server : https://discord.gg/2XCPCVa59h

 

You can see the Test Datapack for example machines and recipe json.

You can see the Test KubeJS server script for example machine and recipe using kubejs
